title: Anesthesiologists
description: Administer anesthetics and analgesics for pain management prior to, during, or after surgery.

tasks.text: Monitor patient before, during, and after anesthesia and counteract adverse reactions or complications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Record type and amount of anesthesia and patient condition throughout procedure.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide and maintain life support and airway management and help prepare patients for emergency surgery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer anesthetic or sedation during medical procedures, using local, intravenous, spinal, or caudal methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine patient, obtain medical history, and use diagnostic tests to determine risk during surgical, obstetrical, and other medical procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Position patient on operating table to maximize patient comfort and surgical accessibility.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate administration of anesthetics with surgeons during operation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Decide when patients have recovered or stabilized enough to be sent to another room or ward or to be sent home following outpatient surgery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with other medical professionals to determine type and method of anesthetic or sedation to render patient insensible to pain.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Order laboratory tests, x-rays, and other diagnostic procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inform students and staff of types and methods of anesthesia administration, signs of complications, and emergency methods to counteract reactions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide medical care and consultation in many settings, prescribing medication and treatment and referring patients for surgery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage anesthesiological services, coordinating them with other medical activities and formulating plans and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Diagnose illnesses, using examinations, tests, and reports.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate and direct work of nurses, medical technicians, and other health care providers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct individuals and groups on ways to preserve health and prevent disease.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Schedule and maintain use of surgical suite, including operating, wash-up, waiting rooms, or anesthetic and sterilizing equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct medical research to aid in controlling and curing disease, to investigate new medications, and to develop and test new medical techniques.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
